name: Priority Visa Infinite Credit Card

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar quarter
international: 2 complimentary international lounge visits per month for FUM qualified clients

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
additionalBenefits: Complimentary for Standard Chartered Priority Banking relationship clients
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for international lounge access

salaried: Priority Banking relationship and bank approval required
selfEmployed: Priority Banking relationship and bank approval required

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Earns 5 reward points per ₹100 spent on overseas or retail fashion transactions (1.25% return value). 1 point = ₹0.25.
Earns 2 reward points per ₹100 spent on other transactions (0.50% return value).
Complimentary domestic lounge access (4 per quarter) is provided unconditionally.
Complimentary international lounge access (2 per month via Priority Pass) is provided only for FUM (Funds Under Management) qualified Priority Banking clients.
